node.statement: (GNS decomposition). For a state with active blocks I = {i : λ_i > 0}, the GNS representation is π_φ ≅ ⊕_{i ∈ I} id_{d_i}^{⊕r_i} where r_i = rank(ρ_i). The irreducible representations of A = ⊕ M_{d_i}(C) are exactly the identity representations id_{d_i} on each block M_{d_i}(C) (composed with projection onto the i-th summand). These are pairwise inequivalent for distinct i (they act on different-dimensional spaces, or if d_i = d_j they are inequivalent because they factor through different summands). The commutant is π_φ(A)' ≅ ⊕_{i ∈ I} M_{r_i}(C).
